title: High Performance MySQL
subtitle: Proven Strategies for Operating at Scale
themes: Understanding MySQL's architecture and InnoDB internals to reason about performance
Benchmarking, profiling, and measurement as prerequisites for any optimization
Schema design and indexing strategies that match real query patterns
Reading EXPLAIN output and understanding the query optimizer
Replication topologies for high availability and read scaling
Backup, recovery, and disaster planning for production MySQL
Scaling beyond a single server: sharding, MySQL Cluster, Galera, Vitess
Locking, transactions, and MVCC in a high-concurrency world
awards: Considered the definitive MySQL performance reference since the first edition (2004)
O'Reilly best-selling database title for nearly two decades
Standard reference recommended by Percona, Oracle, and the wider MySQL community
excerpt: High Performance MySQL is the definitive guide to squeezing every drop of performance, reliability, and scalability out of MySQL. Written by the founders and engineers of Percona and other MySQL luminaries, the fourth edition covers InnoDB internals, indexing, query optimization, replication, backup and recovery, and scaling strategies for operating MySQL at production scale.
